features: Transform dark blonde or brown hair to a striking new look with our permanent bright red hair dye colouring kit, with plex hair care treatment to protect, rebuild, and restore your hair's structure
Hollywood Red permanent hair dye; for a full head of colour, cover grey, root touch-up, balayage, undertones, lowlights. For all hair types, including chemically treated hair, Afro, Asian, men, women
PPD Free. Vegan, cruelty-free red hair dye. Using UK and European endorsed cosmetic standard ingredients blended into a smooth cream for home use. Award-winning Smart Beauty hair colour collection
Mess-free application. Mix the red colour cream and developer in the provided bottle, evenly apply with the precision nozzle and work through with gloved hands for a non-drip colouring experience
Smart Beauty is a customer focussed family-owned British business that produces premium vegan hair dye colouring kits. Committed to non-animal testing, ethical practice, minimal environmental impact
description: Product Description Smart Beauty Hollywood Red Hair Dye Permanent Top tips on making your colour last longer After colouring, wait for a full 72 hrs before shampooing Use sulfate-free shampoo and conditioner Turn down water temperature when shampooing Smart Beauty Hollywood Red Hair Dye Permanent With Plex anti-breakage technology added to the formulation Smart Plex, described as ‘the single most important development in hair colour’ plex is unlike other conditioners and treatments which only add ingredients. Plex actually nourishes and rebuilds the micro-bond fibre structure of the hair making it healthier and stronger. Protects your hair against damage & breakage Rebuilds your hairs natural structure Restores your hairs strength, suppleness & volume PERMANENT RED HAIR DYE: Beautiful and fashionable shade of Hollywood Red Hair Colour, a professional quality vibrant hair dye with advanced hair care ingredients. For dark blonde to mid-brown hair RED HAIR DYE WITH ADDED SMART PLEX ANTI HAIR BREAKAGE TECHNOLOGY: Plex is the innovative and best product to nourish and rebuild the micro-bond fiber structure, making the hair healthier & stronger. EASY TO USE: Inside the red hair dye home colour kit is a full guide with links to further help. Non-drip formula: mix the red hair dye permanent colour cream with developer, apply & blend into hair. SMART BEAUTY VEGAN HAIR DYE & CRUELTY FREE HAIR DYE: we are a small UK business. Our mission; to provide a high-quality vibrant hair dyes with advanced hair care ingredients with full customer support FOR BEST RESULTS USING SMART BEAUTY PERMANENT RED HAIR DYE: Apply it to dark blonde to mid-brown hair. If your hair is darker the result will not be as visible or will not provide your desired shade. GREY COVERAGE: We place great emphasis on achieving intense colour results; equal to quality results achieved at a professional salon. Smart Beauty's bright red hair dye permanent colour covers grey SMART BEAUTY HOLLYWOOD RED PERMANENT HAIR DYE. Salon quality red hair colour in a home hair colour kit, with full customer support helping you get the very best results, and consider the environment. How to colour your hair with Smart Beauty Hollywood Red Permanent Hair Dye Pack contents 1 x Tube of red hair colour cream 1 x Bottle of developer cream 1 x Pair of protective gloves 1 x Instruction leaflet Getting Started • Start with dry, unwashed hair • Cover your clothing with old towel/cape • Wear protective gloves provided • Keep your clock nearby to check development time How to mix the red hair dye • Unscrew the cap of the developer cream bottle • Unscrew the cap of the tube of colour cream and pierce the tube with the reverse of the cap • Squeeze the entire contents of the tube into the developer cream bottle, carefully • Replace with nozzle and shake vigorously until both creams are thoroughly blended into a smooth, creamy consistency • Remove the tip of the application nozzle and immediately start the application How to apply the red hair dye • Start applying the red hair dye mix at the roots. Use the application nozzle tip to work through hair to separate the hair section by section. • Spread and apply the remaining product all over, making sure the hair is completely saturated and leave to develop for a total of 30 minutes Enjoy your Smart Beauty Hollywood Red Permanent Hair Dye • Wearing gloves, work hair into a lather • Rinse thoroughly with warm water, until water runs clear • Wash with colour safe shampoo • Towel dry, and style as desired • Smart Colour+plex already contain conditioning treatment, so you do not need to use additional conditioner • For colour longevity, we recommend using a colour protect serum We take responsibility for our impact on society and the planet Colour results The above swatches is for guidance only. Please complete a hair strand test before full application. The red hair colour result is permanent and the longevity can be influenced by many factors such as natural hair colour, previous treatments, condition, porosity, length and thickness of hair. The red hair colour will fade with routine shampooing. IMPORTANT: Follow the safety instructions. An allergy alert test must be done 48 hours before use. Guidance for red hair colour intensity Always read and follow the full instructions inside the pack Red Hair Colour Development time; IMPORTANT: The development time starts from when you mix the product. Work quickly and apply evenly to the hair as per instructions. If you leave the product on your hair for longer than the development time, you will not get the desired result, the colour will be over-processed and will be a fainter hue. And you risk damaging your hair. If your hair is thick or long, two packs may be required PPD Free, 100% vegan hair dye, cruelty-free hair dye formulation Smart Beauty with Plex | Amethyst Purple Smart Beauty with Plex | Hollywood Red Smart Beauty with Plex | Sapphire Blue Smart Beauty with Plex | Plum Smart Beauty with Plex | Amber Smart Beauty with Plex | Dark Red Velvet Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.0 out of 5 stars 6,973 4.0 out of 5 stars 6,973 4.0 out of 5 stars 6,973 4.0 out of 5 stars 6,973 4.0 out of 5 stars 6,973 4.0 out of 5 stars 6,973 Price £12.45 £ 12 . 45 £12.45 £ 12 . 45 £12.45 £ 12 . 45 £12.45 £ 12 . 45 £12.45 £ 12 . 45 £12.45 £ 12 . 45 Permanence Permanent Permanent Permanent Permanent Permanent Permanent Colours available Amethyst Purple Hollywood Red Sapphire Blue Plum Copper Dark Red Velvet Enriched with Plex ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Vegan ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Cruelty free ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Suitable For Dark Blonde to Medium Brown Dark Blonde to Medium Brown Dark Blonde to Medium Brown Dark Blonde to Medium Brown Dark Blonde to Medium Brown Dark Blonde to Medium Brown Why Choose Deep Amethyst Purple Bright Hollywood Red Dark Sapphire Blue Vibrant Plum Deep Amber Dark Red Velvet Smart Beauty Creative Hair Colouring...Made Easy Our mission is to be cruelty-free, vegan and source locally. We develop the best formulations which are easy and safe to use. Our products are made in the EU and UK Smart Beauty is a small UK business. Our mission is to provide a high-quality vibrant hair dyes with advanced hair care ingredients and with full customer support We’ve been making hair colour for over 16 years, and we’re exceptionally proud of them. We try to do business the right way; we take responsibility for our impact on society and the planet.

product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: HAIR COLOURANTS CAN CAUSE SEVERE ALLERGIC REACTIONS. Read and follow instructions. This product is not intended for use on persons under the age of 16. Temporary “black henna” tattoos may increase your risk of allergy. Do not colour your hair if : you have a rash on your face or sensitive, irritated and damaged scalp, you have ever experienced any reaction after colouring your hair. you have experienced a reaction to a temporary “black henna” tattoo in the past. the developer creme contains hydrogen peroxide the colourant gel contains ammonia. avoid contact of the product with eyes. Do not use to dye eyelashes or eyebrows. Rinse eyes immediately and thoroughly if product comes into contact with them. Wear the gloves supplied in the box. Rinse hair well after application. Wait at least 2 weeks after using a relaxer, a perm or a straightening process on the hair. Do not use if your hair has been coloured with henna or with a progressive hair colourant. Keep out of reach of children.
